evidence.description: Implemented auto-fix engine for skill cards with dry-run, backup, and re-validation loop
fixable_issues: Missing optional fields with defaults (priority→medium, version→0.1.0, tags→[], related_cards→[])
Non-ISO date normalization (YYYY.MM.DD, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYYMMDD → YYYY-MM-DD)
Empty string filtering from array fields (tags, sources, task_types, etc.)
